metadata.title: Andreas Hilgers - Engineering Manager & Senior Full-Stack Developer
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Andreas Hilgers, an Engineering Leader and Senior Full-Stack Developer with 20+ years of experience in digital transformation, software architecture, and AI integration.
metadata.ogTitle: Andreas Hilgers | Engineering Management & Tech Leadership
metadata.ogDescription: Scaling digital platforms and leading high-performing engineering teams with 20+ years of expertise.

hero.name: Andreas Hilgers
hero.description: Over 20 years of experience designing, building, and scaling digital platforms, APIs, and high-traffic SaaS applications. Expert in leading cross-functional teams and driving end-to-end digital transformation.
hero.subdescription: Bridging the gap between business objectives and technical excellence while delivering scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineering Leadership & Technical Excellence
about.description: I am a Senior Full-Stack Developer and Engineering Leader with a career spanning over two decades. My expertise lies in architecting robust digital ecosystems and leading teams through complex technical challenges. I have a proven track record of modernizing legacy systems and scaling high-traffic applications. Currently, I am focused on advancing the frontiers of vibe coding and agentic development, integrating cutting-edge AI services into production-grade environments.
about.quote: Delivering excellence by bridging the gap between business strategy and scalable software architecture.

looking_for.title: What I'm looking for
looking_for.content: I am seeking new challenges in an environment that values technical excellence, exciting technologies, and strong team spirit. I am passionate about opportunities where I can contribute my experience and grow together with visionary teams.

experience.title: Professional Journey & Education
experience.subtitle: Two decades of technical leadership, innovation, and continuous learning

items.description: Successful completion of secondary school with a focus on science and technical foundations.
Self-employed web designer building websites for local businesses. Created Flash intros with ActionScript, hand-coded HTML/CSS websites, and produced logo and flyer designs for print and digital use.

State-certified Information Technology Assistant. Comprehensive vocational training including advanced technical college entrance qualification, focusing on low-level programming, network architectures, and engineering fundamentals.
Junior Developer entering professional software development. Developed a magazine subscription system and digital client solutions for web-based applications.
Development of database-driven applications and internal tools within a secure governmental environment.
Development of desktop software, webservices, apps, and the Computerbild Cloud. Founder of CyberGhost VPN; the company later became ZenGuard.
Completed an intensive online course on agile software development management methodologies. Specialized in Scrum processes, agile planning, and high-performance team collaboration.
State-certified vocational training with a focus on software engineering and architecture.
Founded and scaled a specialized software engineering agency delivering high-performance B2B ecosystems. Orchestrated full-lifecycle delivery for international clients.

Subsidiary of Kape Technologies PLC — home to brands such as CyberGhostVPN, ExpressVPN, and Private Internet Access (PIA). Responsibility for web technologies and global software infrastructures within the Kape Technologies ecosystem.
Successful completion of the 'Designing and Managing Projects' course. Advanced strategic management skills for international IT projects.

Leading digitalization initiatives and technical leadership of the development team in European rail freight services. Developing the Online Cargo Planner as a whitelabel solution in a hybrid environment.
Successful completion of the online course on the fundamentals of Objectives and Key Results (OKR). Focused on strategic goal setting and alignment in agile organizations.
Strategically developed the engineering organization. Leading the technological vision with a focus on scalability and innovation.
Intensive focus on Agent-Driven Development, LLMs, and AI-powered workflow automation. Researching and implementing advanced AI systems for production use in scalable environments.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: Milestones from over 20 years of development
projects.description: A selection of strategic projects and platforms that have significantly contributed to digital transformation.

items.title: Firepire
items.description: High-performance, modular full-stack platform for crypto news and market data. Combines microservice orchestration with a scalable frontend and automated data workers — designed as the source of truth for Web3 information.
items.details: Lead Architect and developer of the entire ecosystem — from infrastructure blueprints (Docker Compose/Terraform) to specialized services and workers. Built for extreme extensibility: every service is independently deployable. Strict snake_case API contract ensures consistency across all service boundaries. Auto-seeded with 45+ blockchain networks and 55+ cryptocurrencies out of the box.
features: Account Service: identity management with Web3 login (Ethereum/Solana) and MFA
Content Service: AI-driven CMS for news and guides with automated enrichment via Perplexity AI
Crypto Service: canonical registry for networks, coins, and global market statistics (CoinGecko, DefiLlama)
Advertisement Service: integrated ad campaigns (Binance/Changelly)
Data Aggregation Pipeline: background workers (BullMQ) consolidating and synchronizing multi-source market data
Security-first: API key hardening, role management, UID exposure prevention
Multi-Cloud deployment via Terraform (GCP Cloud Run, AWS ECS Fargate, Azure Container Apps)

items.title: MemoryMesh AI
items.description: "The AI that remembers you" — a platform for persistent, personalized AI interactions. Solves the statelessness problem of conventional AI assistants through an intelligent two-layer memory architecture.
items.details: Co-founded and led as Lead Architect from vision to implementation. Built on a Planning-First workflow (ADRs, Blueprints) with a production-grade monorepo (Turborepo), deployed via Docker/Traefik. The architecture prioritizes Context Injection over naive retrieval to minimize latency and LLM token costs. A background Compression Pipeline asynchronously distills conversations into a personal knowledge graph using Vector Embeddings and semantic search (pgvector). A Modular Tool Architecture enables scalable Function Calling with real-time updates via SSE.
features: Two-Layer Memory: Long-Term Memory (PostgreSQL + pgvector) and Short-Term Session Cache to optimize context window usage
Compression Pipeline: asynchronous background processing that weaves conversations into a personal knowledge graph
AI Personas (e.g. Dr. Mente, Lex) with individual character, knowledge domains, and persistent relationship to the user
Tool-Mediated Chat: Reminders, document management, and web search as native AI tools
Social Memory Graph: cross-user relationship and interaction analytics
Real-time streaming via SSE and Vercel AI SDK
Security via Better Auth; background jobs via Redis & BullMQ

items.title: Online Cargo Planner
items.description: End-to-end logistics platform for rail freight services — from order creation and tendering to execution and completion. Customers (EVUs) manage orders, documents, certificates, and compliance in one place.
items.details: Service providers get a full back-office suite: dispatching, accounting, team management, HR, digital document storage, invoicing and payment processing, CRM, time tracking, vacation planning, warehouse and material management, and fleet management — all in a single platform.
features: Order management: creation, tendering, processing, and closure
Document generation and management per order
Mobile app for field service providers
Customer portal for EVUs: orders, documents, certificates, and compliance
Dispatching, accounting, and team management for service providers
Invoicing, payment processing, and CRM
Time tracking and vacation planning
Warehouse, material, and vehicle fleet management
Whitelabel architecture for multi-tenant deployment

items.title: HUNCHster
items.description: Open Innovation SaaS platform for enterprises — enabling collaborative idea generation with deep social integration (Facebook, LinkedIn, XING), CRM connectivity, and a native iOS app. Built from idea to launch as Lead Developer and Project Manager.
items.details: Full ownership from concept to delivery: idea, planning, budgeting, milestone planning, hiring and managing external agencies, designers, and a distributed team of freelancers. Led both the technical architecture and the project management — responsible for scope, timelines, and stakeholder communication throughout. The platform was containerized and hosted on cloud infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines and a managed testing process.
features: Collaborative ideation platform for enterprises with real-time updates via Socket.io
Deep social integration: Facebook, LinkedIn, XING, and more
CRM integrations for enterprise connectivity
Native iOS app consuming the REST/JSON API
Angular SPA frontend with PHP/Laminas + Node.js/Express backend
Cloud-hosted, containerized architecture with CI/CD and automated testing
Full project ownership: idea, budgeting, milestone planning, agency and freelancer management

items.title: Outbox AG
items.description: Full-stack development for a VoIP/SIP telecommunications provider. Deep backend integration with telecom service interfaces via SOAP, XML, and REST APIs — extracting and processing connection data from live carrier systems.
items.details: Frontend built with a jQuery-based custom framework and Backbone.js, delivering a responsive end-customer portal. Backend heavy-lifting in PHP and Python: parsing CDRs (call detail records) and raw connection data from carrier APIs, normalizing telco data into structured formats, and exposing it through clean REST interfaces.
features: End-customer portal: call detail records, account analytics, and downloadable reports
SOAP & XML integration with telecom carrier interfaces for live connection data
Payment processing and account management for VoIP/SIP customers
Custom jQuery/Backbone.js SPA framework for dynamic UI without page reloads
PHP & Python backend: CDR ingestion, normalization, and billing logic
REST API layer for frontend and third-party consumer access
Billing portal with invoice generation and payment history

items.title: Computerbild Cloud
items.description: "Made in Germany" Dropbox alternative built for COMPUTER BILD's million-user audience. Full-stack responsibility: Angular frontend with a Dropbox-style file manager, integrated media viewer, and online Office suite (docs, spreadsheets, etc.) — plus a multi-consumer REST API serving web, apps, and third-party clients.
items.details: Lead Frontend & API Developer. The Angular SPA delivered a seamless file management experience with drag-and-drop uploads, inline media playback, and embedded document editing. The dual-stack API layer (PHP/php-fpm for core storage logic, Node.js for real-time and event-driven workloads) was designed for external consumers — mobile apps, partner integrations, and third-party services — with versioned endpoints and consistent response contracts.
features: Angular SPA with Dropbox-inspired file manager: folder hierarchy, drag-and-drop, bulk actions
Integrated media viewer: image galleries, video and audio playback inline
Online Office integration: document, spreadsheet, and presentation editing in-browser
Dual-stack REST API: PHP/php-fpm (storage core) and Node.js (real-time, events)
Multi-consumer API design: web frontend, mobile apps, and external third-party clients
Versioned API with consistent contracts across all consumer types
Scaled for millions of users in cooperation with COMPUTER BILD

items.title: SystemUp
items.description: Windows system tuning and maintenance suite for the retail market — combining low-level system tools (registry cleaner, defrag, undelete, Speed Booster) with a pioneering approach: UI/UX built with web technologies (HTML/CSS/JavaScript) rendered inside a custom desktop parser engine.
items.details: Worked as developer on the registry cleaner and system tools in Delphi, directly interfacing with Windows internals, registry hives, and system services. Also responsible for designing and building the application's UI using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — rendered through a proprietary desktop parser, effectively bringing web-based UI/UX development to native Windows software years before Electron made it mainstream.
features: Registry Cleaner: deep Windows registry scanning, analysis, and safe cleanup (Delphi)
Defragmentation tool for file system optimization
Undelete: file recovery from NTFS/FAT file systems
Windows Speed Booster: startup, service, and performance tweaks
Custom web-technology UI: HTML/CSS/JavaScript rendered via a proprietary desktop parser
System services interface: enable, disable, and configure Windows services
Retail-ready packaging for mass-market distribution

items.title: CyberGhost VPN
items.description: Full-stack development on the global CyberGhost VPN web presence and account platform serving millions of users — website, account management webapp, REST API, payment integrations, and marketing/tracking infrastructure, all built on PHP/Zend Framework and Angular.
items.details: Responsible for the public-facing website (PHP/Zend Framework, Bootstrap, jQuery) and the Angular-based account management webapp. Built and maintained the REST API (Zend Framework, JSON) consumed by web, desktop, and mobile clients. Integrated payment providers, marketing tracking systems, and operated the live services in production.
features: Global marketing website in PHP/Zend Framework with Bootstrap and jQuery
Angular SPA for account management: subscriptions, devices, billing, and profile
REST API in Zend Framework/JSON for web, desktop, and mobile consumers
Payment provider integrations for a global multi-currency subscriber base
Marketing and tracking integrations: analytics, attribution, and campaign tooling
Production operations and service reliability for a multi-million user platform

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: Two decades of hands-on expertise across the full stack — from pixel-perfect UIs to distributed cloud systems and AI-driven products.
skills.description: A comprehensive set of skills built through 20+ years of professional practice across startups, agencies, enterprise platforms, and international SaaS products.
